Notes: 1. The following notes are to be used for estimating labor to fabricate and erect forms. Refer to TM 3-34.44/FM 5-428/MCRP 3-40D.4 for information on concrete form design and materiel estimating procedures. 2. Concrete forming estimates are based on using form accessories, form ties, and steel column clamps. 3. Suspended slabs, beams, and girders are figures using 4- by 4-inch shores and wooden wedges. For adjustable shores, use a 0.9 multiplier. 4. Forming walls over 10 feet high and other high work will increase erection time. To compensate, use a 1.1–1.5 multiplier depending on job complexity.
